description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt, made of 100% polyester and printed logo on left chestFittingComfortWash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash Wash with like colours Wash and iron inside out Do not use fabric softener Use mild detergent only Do not iron on motif/print/trims/logo If you love to stay dry, fresh and comfortable, there's no better wear than this black t-shirt from adidas. Engineered with technology that wicks away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable througout, this round neck tee fits neatly along the contours of your body, providing you with a perfect Fit. Wear it to the gym or the Sports club, or simply pair it with jeans and casual footwear for that cool look.Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
